case_title: JAHMEIAYABRISE RAZEIA KENYA MATTOS-TANCE VS. SHADEEP SINGH

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MATTOS-TANCE, JAHMEIAYABRISE RAZEIA KENYA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAY-30-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-30-2019 BY REBECCA WOODSON. JUDGE PRO TEM: REBECCA WOODSON, CLERK: A. PASCUAL, NOT REPORTED. (D525)

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAY-30-2019 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT AFFIRMED. THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF MAR-20-2019 REMAINS THE SAME. THIS JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952.
FILED SC-220 REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS. FILED BY DEFENDANT SINGH, SHADEEP AS TO PLAINTIFF MATTOS-TANCE, JAHMEIAYABRISE RAZEIA KENYA

ORDER ON REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS: THE REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS IS APPROVED, AND THE COURT ORDERS: PAYMENTS OF $200.00 ON THE 10TH DAY OF EACH MONTH STARTING AUGUST 10, 2019 UNTIL DATE OF FINAL PAYMENT ON MARCH 10, 2020. THE AMOUNT OF THE FINAL PAYMENT IS $171.80. THE COURT ORDERS THAT PAYMENTS MUST BE RECEIVED BY THE 10TH OF EACH MONTH, PAY PAL PREFERRED.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING CALENDAR OF MAR. 20, 2019. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT, PARTIES WERE PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT TAKES THIS MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. PLAINTIFF EXHIBIT RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-20-2019 - JUDGMENT.
